      • READING_LIGHTS_SWITCH_VOICE

        static final int READING_LIGHTS_SWITCH_VOICE
        [V446K private]Voice independent control of turning on or off the reading lights in each area, and reading the status of the reading lights in each area. Parameters: 0 indicates off, 1 indicates on [V446K私有]语音独立控制各区域阅读灯开启或者关闭，并且读取各区域阅读灯状态，参数：0表示关闭，1表示开启
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • Integer property type 0 indicates off, 1 indicates on
        deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2025-07-21 09:37:28
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values
